Description: Finds the image in the current screen and returns a list of matches or None if no match was found.
Finds the text in the current screen and returns a list of matches or None if no match was found. (not reliable due to OCR)
Left Click on the given match, previously found with the find method or manually created by coordinates.
Right Click on the given match, previously found with the find method or manually created by coordinates.
Double Left Click on the given match, previously found with the find method or manually created by coordinates.
Drags the source match to the target match.
Presses the given key or keys
Idles the experiment for the given amount of time.
Executes the given command in the shell.
Runs the test with the given name.
Runs a list of tests with the given names.
Logs an error message with the given name and message.
Saves the given value under the given name in the variables file.
Saves the current timestamp under the given name in the variables file.
Waits until a specified condition becomes true or times out. Supports text/image targets and boolean logic (all/any/negate).
